name: Move
effect: Move up to the Fighter's Movement characteristic in inches. A Fighter within melee range of an enemy cannot move out of melee range with that enemy.

name: Disengage
effect: Move up to 3" ending movement more than 1” away from all enemy Fighters.

name: Attack
effect: Make a melee or ranged attack with one of the Fighter's weapon profiles.

name: Wait
effect: The Fighter may choose to end their activation, delaying any remaining actions for another activation later in the phase.

name: Swamp
effect: Movement through this terrain is halved (rounding up).

name: Lever
effect: A Fighter within 1" of this terrain can use this ability to open or close the Door.

name: Into the Pit
effect: A Fighter after doing damage to another Fighter within 1" of this terrain feature can activate this ability to remove the damaged Fighter from the battlefield and have them considered taken out.

name: ▲ Boost WS +1
effect: Boost WS by +1

name: ▲ Boost WS +2
effect: Boost WS by +2

name: ▲ Boost BS +1
effect: Boost BS by +1

name: ▲ Boost BS +2
effect: Boost BS by +2

name: ▲ Boost Def +1
effect: Boost Def by +1

name: ▲ Boost Def +2
effect: Boost Def by +2

name: ▲ Boost W +2
effect: Boost Wounds by +2

name: ▲ Boost W +4
effect: Boost Wounds by +4

name: Sprint
effect: For the rest of this Fighter's activation, increase the move trait by 1.

name: Charge!
effect: Use this ability only after this Fighter has taken a move action which ended in melee range of an enemy Fighter. This Fighter's next melee attack gains +1 attack dice.

name: Overwatch
effect: Reaction: After an enemy Fighter finishes a move action. This Fighter can make an Attack action with a weapon that can target the moving Fighter (they will need to spend an action as normal to make that Attack).

name: Surge
effect: This Fighter can make a bonus move action up to X or the Fighter's move (whichever is shorter). Then the Fighter can make a free attack action (they do not spend an action for this attack).

name: ▼ Gut Wound
effect: This Fighter's wound characteristic is reduced by 2. This injury can be taken multiple times. Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: ▼ Cracked Rib
effect: This Fighter can only take one move action per turn. If this injury is rolled a second time, treat it as a Flesh Wound. Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: ▼ Eye Injury
effect: This Fighter's Ballistic Skill is reduced by 1. This injury can be taken multiple times (to a minimum of 2 BS). Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: ▼ Broken Arm
effect: This Fighter's Weapon Skill is reduced by 1. This injury can be taken multiple times (to a minimum of 2 WS). Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: ▼ Leg Fracture
effect: Subtract 1 from the Move characteristic of this Fighter. This injury can be taken multiple times (to a minimum of 2 Move). Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: ▼ Head Trauma
effect: This Fighter cannot use abilities in the first Mission round, and thereafter can use only one ability per round. If this injury is rolled a second time, treat it as a Flesh Wound. Decrease this Fighter's cost by 5.

name: Fly
effect: This Fighter can move over terrain and other models without being impeded. They do not need to climb or go around obstacles when moving. At the end of Fighter's activation, they must end their move with the centre of their base on a platform or the battlefield floor.

name: Leader
effect: Choose two friendly fighters within 6" of this model. Both fighters may immediately perform a free 3" move (this cannot be used to leave Melee Range).

name: Assault
effect: For the remainder of the round, this weapon gains +1 attack dice at half range.

name: Balanced
effect: Reaction: After dice have been rolled for an attack with this weapon, if there are no hits or crits, change one miss to a hit.

name: Blast
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, if the attack has at least one hit or crit, all fighters (friend and foe) within 2" of the target suffer damage equal to a hit damage.

name: Brutal
effect: Reaction: After an attack roll with this weapon, upgrade one hit to a crit.

name: Concussive
effect: After performing an attack with this weapon, if at least one hit or crit is scored, the target is shoved 3" directly away from the attacker. If the target hits a piece of terrain or another model, they stop and immediately suffer 1 damage.

name: Heavy
effect: This weapon cannot be fired if the Fighter has moved more than 2" this turn.

name: Lethal
effect: If an attack with this weapon would normally crit on a 6, it now also crits on a 5.

name: Limited(1)
effect: This item can only be used once per battle. The item is available again the next battle.

name: Parry
effect: Reaction: When an attack with melee ranged targets this fighter, increase their Defence by 1.

name: Piercing
effect: For the next attack with this weapon, subtract 2 from the target’s Defence to a minimun of 3.

name: Pistol
effect: Pistols are one-handed weapons. When in melee range (0-3) attacks with this weapon use Ballistic Skill.

name: Poison
effect: If an attack with this weapon did at least one point of damage, roll X dice and do 1 damage to the same target for each 4-5 and X damage for each 6.

name: Rapid Fire
effect: For the rest of the turn attacks with this weapon gain +1 attack dice.

name: Reliable
effect: Reaction: After dice have been rolled for an attack with this weapon, if there are no hits or crits, change one miss to a hit.

name: Relentless
effect: This fighter may immediately make a bonus 3" move action.

name: Rending
effect: On a critical hit, increase the damage of all other hits from this attack by +1.

name: Shred
effect: After resolving an attack with this weapon, target suffers -1 Defence until the end of the round.

name: Silent
effect: Making this attack does not trigger reactions or abilities from enemy fighters.

name: Spread
effect: This attack may target up to two targets within 1" of each other.

name: Stowed
effect: This weapon does not require a hand to carry or use.

name: Two-Handed
effect: This weapon occupies both hand slots.

name: Unwieldy
effect: This fighter cannot use this weapon to make Reactions.

name: Beast
effect: Cannot open doors, climb ladders, or use equipment. Often found on animal or creature-type fighters.

name: Champion
effect: If no other Fighter in this warband has the Leader trait, this Fighter can act as the Leader.
